summary: Matched most of sysdolphin baselib shadow support by filling in large portions of shadow.c, including shadow texture sizing, render begin/end flow, active-state texture registration, object list management, shadow projection matrix generation, and viewing-rectangle validation. The PR also corrected several Dolphin GX/MTX prototypes and baselib type declarations needed by the shadow code. The author explicitly noted that some shadow functions remained missing because they depended on VEC code/prototypes that were not yet set up.
what_changed: Expanded src/sysdolphin/baselib/shadow.c by roughly 280 lines, adding matched implementations for HSD_ShadowSetSize, HSD_ShadowStartRender, HSD_ShadowEndRender, HSD_ShadowSetActive, HSD_ShadowAddObject, HSD_ShadowDeleteObject, a static makeMatrix helper, and HSD_ViewingRectCheck.

Added shadow rendering setup that configures camera state, TEV, PE mode, channel color, scissor rectangles, vertex descriptors, a background quad, and then renders registered JObjs with HSD_JObjDispAll using RENDER_SHADOW.

Added shadow texture lifecycle behavior: allocate/free image buffers based on GXGetTexBufferSize, copy rendered shadow output with GXCopyTex, sync with GXPixModeSync, invalidate textures with GXInvalidateTexAll, and update the texture projection matrix.
Added shadow object list management using HSD_SListAllocAndPrepend/HSD_SListRemove and JObj refcounting through new HSD_JObjRef plus existing HSD_JObjUnref.
Replaced a temporary float-constant workaround in HSD_ShadowAlloc with direct 0.0f arguments to HSD_CObjSetViewportfx4.
Added HSD_TrspMask as an enum in forward.h with HSD_TRSP_OPA, HSD_TRSP_XLU, HSD_TRSP_TEXEDGE, and HSD_TRSP_ALL, replacing the previous u32 typedef in jobj.h.
Changed HSD_JObjDispSub's trsp_mask parameter from u32 to HSD_TrspMask in the local declaration in jobj.c.
Corrected GXSetVtxAttrFmt to take GXCompType for its component type parameter instead of GXAttrType, and removed matching-blocking casts in pobj.c.
Corrected GXCopyTex's destination argument from u32 to void* in GXFrameBuf.c/h, matching its use with image buffer pointers.
Corrected GXInvalidateTexAll from a bogus three-argument prototype to void GXInvalidateTexAll(void), matching its implementation and call site.
Added MTX/VEC convenience aliases and prototypes in mtx.h: VECCrossProduct, VECSubtract, VECNormalize, MTXLightPerspective, MTXLightFrustum, and MTXLightOrtho mapped to PS/C_MTX implementations.
Added TEVCONF_MODE define in texp.h for use in the shadow TEV descriptor.
smart_moves: Fixed library prototypes before relying on them in shadow.c, which allowed call sites to become cleaner and removed incorrect casts in pobj.c rather than preserving bad type information.
Moved HSD_TrspMask from an opaque u32 typedef to a named enum in a shared forward header, making transparent/opaque render-mask call sites more self-documenting.

Used existing baselib systems rather than ad hoc replacements: HSD_State/HSD_SetupTevStageAll/HSD_SetupPEMode for render state, HSD_SList for object tracking, HSD_MObjAddShadowTexture/DeleteShadowTexture for active shadow texture registration, and HSD_JObj refcount helpers for ownership.
Added MTXLight* and VEC macro aliases in mtx.h to match expected SDK-style names while preserving the existing PS/C_ implementation symbols.
Made shadow texture allocation conditional on missing image data or size changes, freeing old image memory before reallocating and updating camera viewport/scissor to match the new texture size.
Kept remaining work bounded: the PR body explicitly says missing shadow functions depend on VEC code/prototypes not yet set up, avoiding speculative implementation.
decomp_lessons: When a newly matched subsystem needs SDK calls, first audit the prototypes: wrong argument types in GXSetVtxAttrFmt, GXCopyTex, and GXInvalidateTexAll caused downstream casts or unusable call signatures.

Prefer precise enum typedefs for bitmask-style parameters when evidence exists. HSD_TrspMask documents valid render-mask bits and improves signatures such as HSD_JObjDispSub/HSD_JObjDispAll call sites.

Decomp work in baselib often requires small header unlocks across Dolphin and sysdolphin, not just the target .c file; shadow.c needed GX, MTX, TEV, JObj, PObj, state, perf, list, and utility declarations.

Replacing temporary hacks after enough file context is matched can improve both source quality and matching. HSD_ShadowAlloc no longer needed a local float hack once float constants could be expressed directly.
Reference ownership should be reflected in matched helper APIs. Adding HSD_JObjRef made HSD_ShadowAddObject mirror HSD_ShadowDeleteObject's unref behavior cleanly.

Projection helper functions are a useful pattern for shadow/texture projection code: branch on HSD_CObj projection type, call the corresponding MTXLight* routine, then concatenate with the camera viewing matrix into the texture matrix.
If a function depends on missing vector prototypes or SDK aliases, adding the aliases/prototypes in the central math header can unblock future matching without inventing unrelated subsystem code.
naming_conventions: Baselib shadow public functions use the HSD_Shadow* prefix, e.g. HSD_ShadowSetSize, HSD_ShadowStartRender, HSD_ShadowEndRender, HSD_ShadowSetActive, HSD_ShadowAddObject, and HSD_ShadowDeleteObject.
Static local helpers in shadow.c used lower camel case names, e.g. makeMatrix and drawBackgroundRect.
Transparent-render mask constants use the HSD_TRSP_* prefix: HSD_TRSP_OPA, HSD_TRSP_XLU, HSD_TRSP_TEXEDGE, HSD_TRSP_ALL.
The transparent mask type is named HSD_TrspMask and lives in forward.h rather than as a plain u32 typedef in jobj.h.

SDK-style macro aliases expose non-prefixed names such as VECCrossProduct, VECSubtract, VECNormalize, MTXLightPerspective, MTXLightFrustum, and MTXLightOrtho while mapping to PSVECCrossProduct/PSVECSubtract/PSVECNormalize and C_MTXLight* implementations.
TEV descriptor mode constant added as TEVCONF_MODE.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Removed incorrect casts in pobj.c after correcting GXSetVtxAttrFmt's parameter type to GXCompType, suggesting that matching improved by fixing the declaration rather than forcing casts at use sites.
Changed GXCopyTex to accept void* so HSD_ShadowEndRender could pass idesc->img_ptr naturally, aligning the source with the real destination-buffer semantics.
Changed GXInvalidateTexAll to a void-argument function because the implementation ignores arguments and shadow rendering needs the no-argument SDK-style call.
Used exact-looking float literals in drawBackgroundRect, including 1.20000004768f and -1.10000002384f, which likely reflects matching-sensitive constant values from the original code.
Added SDK macro aliases in mtx.h so source can call MTXLightPerspective/Frustum/Ortho and VEC* names while still linking to existing C_/PS-prefixed implementations.
Used static initialized HSD_Chan, HSD_TevDesc, and HSD_PEDesc objects inside HSD_ShadowStartRender to mirror original data layout/state setup patterns.
Preserved assert line numbers in new shadow functions, e.g. HSD_ASSERT(277), HSD_ASSERT(501), HSD_ASSERT(698), and HSD_ASSERT(818), which are often important for decomp matching and source fidelity.
review_feedback: No issue comments, review comments, or reviews were present in the provided PR context.
The PR body states: "Matches most of shadow. The missing functions rely on some VEC code we didn't have prototypes setup for, and will likely get to them in the future."
follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that complete the remaining sysdolphin shadow functions blocked by VEC prototypes.
Search for subsequent changes to src/dolphin/mtx.h around VEC and MTXLight prototypes.
Search for later cleanup or matching fixes in HSD_ShadowStartRender and drawBackgroundRect.
Check whether HSD_TrspMask was propagated to all HSD_JObjDispAll/HSD_JObjDispSub declarations after this PR.
Look for later PRs replacing TEVCONF_MODE magic values or expanding texp.h TEV descriptor definitions.
